overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk city environment, starting in a dark neon-lit corridor, passing through an atrium with a golden koi sculpture, and emerging onto an elevated balcony overlooking a dense futuristic cityscape with towering industrial buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk indoor corridor with teal neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dark neon-lit corridor

entered.detail: dark industrial metal paneling covering the corridor walls
exposed ventilation pipes and conduits running along the ceiling
glowing teal neon light fixture illuminating the corridor end
red illuminated vending machine with glowing display
green neon sign with Japanese characters reading '営業中'

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a narrow, dark cyberpunk corridor with teal neon lighting. The walls are covered in industrial metal paneling with exposed pipes overhead. The camera moves steadily forward past a vending machine and various neon signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor atrium with large golden sculpture

events.description: corridor opens into large atrium with golden koi sculpture visible through glass window

agents.ego_description: approaching the large golden koi sculpture visible through the atrium glass

entered.detail: large illuminated golden koi fish sculpture suspended in the atrium
massive glass wall separating the atrium from the city outside
large digital screen displaying advertisements
thick structural support pillar with industrial detailing

segments.scene_description: The corridor opens into a larger atrium space where a massive golden koi fish sculpture becomes visible through a glass wall. The environment transitions from narrow corridor to open viewing area with digital billboards and structural pillars.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition walkway from indoor atrium to outdoor balcony

events.description: exiting the building onto an elevated outdoor balcony overlooking the cyberpunk city

agents.ego_description: moving through doorway from indoor atrium to outdoor elevated walkway

entered.detail: large industrial doorway marking the exit to the exterior
elevated outdoor walkway with metal railings overlooking the city
tall futuristic building with red and black industrial facade
large vertical billboard with pink neon text reading 'WET DREAM'

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a doorway from the indoor atrium to an outdoor elevated balcony. The golden koi sculpture is left behind as the view opens to the cyberpunk cityscape with towering buildings and neon billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated outdoor balcony with industrial city view

events.description: camera pans to look down over the railing at the street far below

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated balcony observing the cyberpunk cityscape below

entered.detail: complex industrial building exterior with pipes and ventilation systems
heavy chains hanging between structures over the street below
distant city street visible through the gap between buildings
large industrial ventilation pipes and exhaust systems

segments.scene_description: Walking along the elevated outdoor balcony with metal railings, the camera reveals a dizzying view of the cyberpunk city below. Industrial facades with complex piping dominate the left side while chains hang across the gap between buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertically oriented view of towering cyberpunk skyscrapers

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the towering buildings above
bright sun glare appears between the skyscrapers from above

agents.ego_description: standing on the balcony looking up at the massive industrial architecture towering overhead

entered.detail: massive skyscraper extending upward with multiple industrial levels and neon signage
bright natural sunlight creating lens flare between the buildings
circular pink neon sign mounted on the building facade
tall modern glass and steel building visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal the immense scale of the cyberpunk architecture, showing towering skyscrapers with industrial detailing and neon signs extending into the night sky. Bright sun glare appears between the buildings, highlighting the vertical density of the city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic, neon-lit interior into the vast, vertical expanse of a futuristic metropolis. It begins by moving steadily through a narrow, dark corridor defined by teal neon lighting, industrial metal paneling, and exposed overhead pipes. As the camera advances past vending machines and signs, the space opens into a wide atrium where a massive golden koi sculpture becomes visible through a glass wall amidst digital billboards. The scene then shifts as the camera passes through a doorway onto an elevated outdoor balcony, leaving the sculpture behind to reveal a dizzying view of industrial facades and hanging chains. Finally, the camera tilts upward to capture the immense scale of towering skyscrapers and neon signs, with bright sun glare piercing through the dense architectural canopy.
